question: Where did I attend the religious activity last week?

runs.response_text: I do not have access to your personal calendar or any information about your activities unless you have provided it in our conversation. Could you please clarify when and where you attended the religious activity last week, or share any relevant details you remember? This will help me assist you better.
According to the conversation history, you attended the **Maundy Thursday service at the Episcopal Church** last week.
I do not have enough information to determine where you attended a religious activity last week.
You attended the Maundy Thursday service at the Episcopal Church last week.
